# Paduma Induwara — Complete Portfolio Context for AI Language Models

## Professional Summary
Paduma Induwara is a world-class Software Engineer and Data Scientist based in Maharagama, Sri Lanka. He specializes in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Next.js, React, Python, TypeScript, and Full Stack Web Development. As the founder of Kingxer Marketing Solutions, he leads digital marketing strategies and develops innovative software solutions for clients worldwide.

## Professional Experience

### Kingxer Marketing Solutions — Owner | Freelance (2020 - Present)
Leading digital marketing strategies and full-scale digital campaigns. Skills: Digital Strategy, Next.js & React, SEO Optimization, Meta Ads, Analytics.

### ICBT Campus — Exam Invigilator (2023 - Present)
Exam integrity and high academic standards. Protocol management, supervision.

### FALCONET — Digital Marketing Intern (2024)
SEO, social media management, content strategy and performance analytics.

### Colombo Dockyard PLC — Industrial Labour (2022)
Industrial experience in shipbuilding with engineering teams.

## Education
1. BSc (Hons) Data Science — Cardiff Metropolitan University (2022-Present). AI, ML, Big Data, Research.
2. Higher Diploma in Computing — ICBT Campus (2022). Distinction. Software Engineering, Full Stack.
3. Foundation in IT — UCSC (2022). Algorithms, Logic Design, Computer Systems.
4. G.C.E A/L & O/L — St. John's College, Nugegoda. Physical Science, Mathematics, Prefects' Guild.
